steps.title: Identify the baseline context
steps.content: The passage opens with “Generally it takes Tule geese about four days”—establishing the TYPICAL migration pattern before revealing that 2020 was an exception. The underlined portion launches the description of this normal journey.

steps.title: Connect to the correct answer
steps.content:
The underlined portion describes the opening stage of the geese's typical winter migration route, which is exactly what the matching choice states.

The other choices all misstate the text—claiming it shows a change in behavior, explains breeding grounds, or compares to other birds.

C is correct.
